run_summary.summary: Active thread on the Flexsteel/Steinhafels deal. Kenny exchanged emails with Ian Saunders (Popfly) on Apr 17 about the filming timeline. The reveal video featuring Liz's dad is delayed because he's having pacemaker surgery end of April with a follow-up on May 11 — earliest filming is May 13/14. Ian was understanding and confirmed the agreement allows until end of May to post video 3. Ian also asked Kenny to register on the Popfly campaign upload platform; Kenny committed to doing that Apr 17.

suggestions.message: Kenny said he'd register on the Popfly campaign platform on Apr 17 — worth confirming that got done. Also check in with Ian closer to May 13 once filming is locked in, so he knows a draft is coming.

deals.next_action: Film reveal video at Steinhafels (Downers Grove, IL) — target May 13/14; confirm Popfly campaign platform registration done
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Filming timeline update — Liz's dad has pacemaker replacement end of April + follow-up appt May 11 in Naples, FL. Earliest he can be in the reveal video is May 13/14. Ian (Popfly) confirmed this is fine; agreement deadline is end of May for video 3. Location confirmed: Steinhafels in Downers Grove, IL. Ian asked Kenny to apply/register on the Popfly campaign platform (for uploading drafts) — Kenny said he'd do it Apr 17.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Thread update — filming target May 13/14 (dad's pacemaker surgery delaying the reveal). Ian OK with timeline, end-of-May deadline intact. Kenny committing to Popfly platform sign-up.
